description: CompositionGold coloured sandals made of lightweight, form fitting, odour resistant EVA and back strapWash care1. Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washHold on to that feminine streak this summer in these well ventillated golden clogs from crocs. The croslite footbed provides ergonomic Fit and comfort and the sandals give superior shock absorption making it a perfect pair for a day on the beach or for urban wear. The small holes on the upper straps can accomodate a few jibbitz. The leaf pattern on the outsole gives superior grip, while the back strap holds the sandals in place, keeping the feet well protected and safe from injuries.Note: Jibbitz is a company founded by Rich and Sheri Schmelzer in 2005 to create decorative attachments for holes in crocs sandals.
